#http://astro.uni-tuebingen.de/~rauch/TMAP/TMAP_solar_abundances.html
#TMAP uses the following values as solar abundances.
#They are taken from Asplund et al. 2009, ARAA 47, 481. 
#and partly replaced by values from 
#F: Maiorca et al. 2014, ApJ 788, 149 
#Na to Ca: Scott et al. 2015, A&A 573, A25 
#Sc to Ni: Scott et al. 2015, A&A 573, A26 
#Ca to Th: Grevesse et al. 2015, A&A 573, A27 

Atom	A	ATW	        logn	n(X)/n(H)	n(X)/n(He)	mass_fraction
H	    1	1.0079	    12.00	1.000E+00	1.175E+01	7.375E-01
He	    2	4.0026	    10.93	8.511E-02	1.000E+00	2.493E-01
